user_feedback: can you make the ao oni a bit slower, and can you also make the objective thats by the right monster on level 6 closer to the middle wall and a bit farther away from the ao oni mponster, and can you make that pathing for that specific ao oni monster to be a larger path so that it doesn't hoard on the objective
analysis:
- Issue identified: Three adjustments needed for level 6: (1) Ao Oni monsters are too fast, (2) the objective near the right monster (obj6_2) is too close to the monster's patrol path, (3) the right monster's patrol path is too small causing it to camp near the objective
- Files affected: globals.js (for base speed), levels.js (for level 6 objective position and patrol path)
- Changes needed: 
  1. Reduce AOI_ONI_BASE_SPEED from 1.8 to 1.5 to make all monsters slower
  2. Move obj6_2 from (520, 100) to (440, 100) - closer to middle wall at x:408, farther from monster
  3. Expand right monster patrol from small rectangle to larger path covering more of the right room: from (440, 60) to (600, 340)
